item.title: Version 0.0.10
item.description:
## What's Changed * appcast: v0.0.9 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/btucker/graftty/pull/92 * release: revert cask step to direct push (tap repo isn't protected) by @btucker in https://github.com/btucker/graftty/pull/93 * fix(panes): override PATH so `graftty` resolves to the CLI (ATTN-4.2) by @btucker in https://github.com/btucker/graftty/pull/94 * fix(pr-status): tighten poll cadence + cap backoff at 60s (PR-7.1, PR-7.2) by @btucker in https://github.com/btucker/graftty/pull/95 * fix(sidebar): restore right-click menu on worktree rows (LAYOUT-2.7) by @btucker in https://github.com/btucker/graftty/pull/97 * feat(worktree): non-blocking creation with placeholder + spinner (GIT-5.4..5.9) by @btucker in https://github.com/btucker/graftty/pull/96
## New Contributors * @github-actions[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/btucker/graftty/pull/92
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/btucker/graftty/compare/v0.0.9...v0.0.10

item.title: Version 0.0.9
item.description:
## What's Changed * release: open PR for appcast + cask bumps instead of direct push by @btucker in https://github.com/btucker/graftty/pull/91
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/btucker/graftty/compare/v0.0.8...v0.0.9
